framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Master Scorecard
framework_documents.description: Single source of truth for PulseOne's current performance metrics mapped against Service Leadership BiC benchmarks. v2.1 integrates Technician Efficiency Audit, Software Resale Addendum, COGS/SGA reclassification, client concentration analysis, and Bunzl portfolio reframe.

framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Action Register
framework_documents.description: Centralized, prioritized register of actionable recommendations. v2.0 reframes software actions around revenue mapping, adds client concentration and Bunzl anomaly actions, integrates Technician Efficiency findings.

framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Standardized Documentation Plan
framework_documents.description: Master plan defining the 4-part standardized documentation architecture: Scorecard, Financial Model, Operational Audits, and Action Register.

financial_model.title: PulseOne Definitive P&L Analysis
financial_model.description: Definitive corrected P&L using confirmed CY 2025 Upwork data. All 12 freelancers classified. Reconciled to $0.30. This is the authoritative P&L version.

financial_model.title: PulseOne COGS Classification Analysis — Person by Person
financial_model.description: Complete person-by-person COGS vs. SG&A classification for all 38 PulseOne personnel. Confirmed by Paul Freeman April 17, 2026.

operational_audits.title: Software Resale & SaaS Rationalization
operational_audits.description: Consolidated software resale and SaaS rationalization audit. Addendum resolves the -9.4% margin as a revenue mapping issue (true CW margin 68.1%). Identifies structural issues with Microsoft M365 (16.4% GM) and Adobe (4.3% GM).

operational_audits.title: Software COGS Gap Analysis
operational_audits.description: Gap analysis between QuickBooks software COGS and ConnectWise Cost/Sell data.

operational_audits.title: COGS Validation Audit
operational_audits.description: Line-item COGS validation audit covering software, labor, and contractor classifications.

operational_audits.title: Technician Utilization, Cost Efficiency & Client Profitability
operational_audits.description: Strategic audit of technician utilization, service delivery workload distribution, labor cost efficiency, and client-level profitability. Confirms Help Desk at 5.41x Service Multiple. Identifies severe client concentration risk and Bunzl ticket anomaly.

operational_audits.title: Utilization & Billing Efficiency
operational_audits.description: Consolidated audit of billing leakage, realization rates, and time entry discipline. Quantifies $514K in uncaptured revenue potential across three leakage areas: write-downs ($16K), unbilled hours ($115K), and unlogged capacity ($385K).

operational_audits.title: Profitability & SG&A Efficiency
operational_audits.description: Consolidated audit of profit leakage sources and SG&A overhead. Maps the $738K EBITDA gap to BiC across four areas: consulting margin deficit ($465K), contractor cost gap ($753K discrepancy), S&M inefficiency ($257K), and G&A tool sprawl ($91K).

operational_audits.title: Client Profitability & Revenue Quality
operational_audits.description: Client concentration analysis, revenue quality assessment, and product sales breakdown. Confirms 73.8% recurring revenue.

operational_audits.title: Revised Comprehensive BiC Audit Report
operational_audits.description: Comprehensive BiC audit incorporating expense tracking and partner compensation allocation.

operational_audits.title: Marketing & Sales Investment Audit
operational_audits.description: Deep audit of $592K S&M spend (11.5% of revenue vs BiC 5.4%). Decomposes spend into Brand/Awareness (34.8%), Sales Enablement (29.1%), Demand Generation (5.6%), and Unclassifiable (30.5%). Identifies catastrophic 71% S&M staff turnover, structural demand generation underinvestment, and Bunzl expansion as highest-ROI growth opportunity.

operational_audits.title: Project Costing & Margin (Incoming)
operational_audits.description: Template for the incoming project margin and costing analysis.

reference_documents.title: Service Leadership BIC Framework Reference
reference_documents.description: Primary BIC framework reference document with benchmark definitions, peer group logic, and scoring methodology.

reference_documents.title: Service Leadership BIC Reference (Summary)
reference_documents.description: Summary reference of BIC benchmarks and thresholds.

reference_documents.title: BIC Benchmarks Raw Data
reference_documents.description: Raw benchmark data extracted from Service Leadership publications.

reference_documents.title: Research Notes
reference_documents.description: Working research notes from initial BIC framework investigation.
